# discord_webhook (Resource)

Manages a webhook attached to a Discord channel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_webhook" "deploys" {
  channel_id = "456789012345678901"
  name       = "Deploy Bot"
}

output "deploy_webhook_url" {
  value     = discord_webhook.deploys.url
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel the webhook posts to.
- `name` (String) Name of the webhook.

### Optional

- `avatar_data_uri` (String) Base64 image data URI for the webhook avatar. Write-only: not refreshed from the API.

### Read-Only

- `guild_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild the webhook's channel belongs to.
- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the webhook.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Secret token used to execute the webhook.
- `url` (String) The full webhook execution URL.
